    U

    UNMOVABLE - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Collision.CollisionType
     
    UnPauseRequest - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv
    this class is used to send a request to the server to unpause the game
    UnPauseRequest() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.UnPauseRequest
     
    UP - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Entity.Direction
    DIRECTION NONE MUST ALWAYS BE AT THE END!
    UP_LEFT - Enum constant in enum class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Entity.Direction

    update() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Drawer
    Updates the position and texture of the ImageView.
    update() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.UserInputHandler
     
    update() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.Weapon
    Updates a weapon's cooldown and reloads a weapon
    update(Level, ArrayList<Entity>) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Camera
     
    update(Level, ArrayList<Entity>) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Enemy
    Updates the enemy's state, weapon, and decision-making processes.
    update(Level, ArrayList<Entity>) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Entity
    Updates the entity by calculating its velocity, updating its position, and checking for collisions with blocks and other entities.
    update(Level, ArrayList<Entity>) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Player
    Updates the player's state including movement, collision detection, weapon updates, interactions, and HUD display.
    update(Level, ArrayList<Entity>) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.Bullet
    Updates TTL and position
    update(Level, ArrayList<Entity>) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.MeleeHitBox
    Updates the state of the mêlée hitbox.
    Update - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv
    The Update class provides static methods to update positions and visibility for both blocks and entities based on the camera position.
    Update() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Update
     
    updateAmmoLabel() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.HudManager
    Updates the ammo label
    updateBlockDrawers(List<BlockDrawer>) - Static method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Update
    Updates the position of block's Drawer
    updateEntityOnScreen(ArrayList<Entity>, ObservableList<Node>) - Static method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Update
    Updates the position of entity's Drawer
    updateHP(int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.HudManager
     
    updateKeyTip() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.HudManager
    Shows interaction String when near Interactable
    updatePosition(Scene) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.CustomCursor
     
    UserInputHandler - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv
    UserInputHandler handles all user inputs including keyboard, mouse, and scroll events.
    UserInputHandler() - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.UserInputHandler
    Constructs a UserInputHandler and initializes key and mouse button mappings.
    userInterfaceList - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    Utils - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv
    The Utils class provides various utility functions including classpath scanning, logging configuration, settings file creation/loading, and generating a list of blocks.
    Utils.Coordinates - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv
